title: Pektin Crossing 2BR
definition: Pektin Crossing 2BR sits near break-even at +$200/month — workable only with disciplined costs and occupancy.

faq.a: Modeled costs and purchase structure absorb most gross — small changes swing the outcome.

faq.q: Should I negotiate harder on price?
faq.a: Often yes when margin is this thin; price is the cleanest lever.
Use the occupancy guide and calculator on CanmoreROI.com.
